title: Ritual Kulkas Kantor
theme: Menggali sisi absurd dari ritual kantor yang tampak sepele, di mana perjuangan batin seorang karyawan menghadapi kecemasan hariannya terungkap dalam sebuah insiden kecil di kulkas komunal.

cover.prompt: A stark white, minimalist communal office refrigerator, positioned as the prominent focal point in a clean, uncluttered office pantry setting. Subtle, diffused ambient light softly illuminates the scene, hinting at a quiet, everyday environment. A faint, cool internal glow emanates from the refrigerator's slightly ajar door, casting a very gentle sheen on its surface. The overall composition evokes a pervasive sense of apprehension and unspoken tension, suggesting unseen elements and a history of forgotten items within its silent enclosure. Cinematic composition, rule of thirds, shallow depth of field, warm color grading.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Aisyah, an anxious office worker, faces a crisis when her favorite labeled yogurt disappears from the communal fridge, seemingly replaced by an unknown pudding. This incident sparks an internal drama about control, injustice, and passive-aggressiveness within the office. After a day of overthinking and plotting 'revenge,' she discovers her yogurt was merely hidden behind other items, and the pudding belonged to someone else. This leads to a realization about her own self-created anxieties and finding peace in the absurdity of office life.
